name: slashexperts-website
description: SlashExperts B2B Peer Validation Platform - Modernized Website

scripts.build:prod: NODE_ENV=production npm run build && npm run optimize
scripts.optimize: npm run optimize:css && npm run optimize:js
scripts.preview: npm run build && cd _site && python3 -m http.server 8080
scripts.test:build: npm run build:prod && npm run preview

author: SlashExperts
